title: Reverse Proxies, Forwarded Fields, Framing, and Request Smuggling Defense · Inference Brief: Proxy Drain Upgrade Evidence
summary: The origin and proxy disagree about framing, forwarded fields are appended without trust, hop-by-hop fields cross boundaries, and parser tolerance is enabled to fix malformed clients. Planned artifact: Add and verify the httpsts proxy drain upgrade evidence increment in proxy hop, framing, and parser-consistency contract. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Test keep-alive reuse, upgrades, CONNECT, streaming, trailers, retries, draining, malformed requests, and changed proxy topology with wire evidence.
Keep insecure parsing disabled, align parser and normalization policies across hops, test differential cases, and close connections on ambiguous messages.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
